title: Monetization notes for side projects
body_markdown:
## Monetization notes for side projects

Low priority; jotted for completeness.

- Open-source the tooling, charge nothing
- The personal wiki is a personal wiki — no product
- If anything becomes a product, it's the *book* that falls out of
  the wiki, not the wiki itself

Revisit if a real product idea emerges. Not looking for one.
